serving_notes.bread: 1 slice or equivalent (approx 50g). Pita = 1 whole pita. Tortilla = 1 tortilla. Bagel = 1 whole bagel.
serving_notes.toppings: Approximately 1 oz (28g) for most items. Leafy greens = 1 cup (~30g).
serving_notes.chefs_special: Varies by item. See individual entries.

meta.estimated_cost_source: Custom research: US retail (generic and artisanal brands) and restaurant per-serving pricing

estimated_cost_contexts.retail: Per-serving cost at grocery/retail (low = generic brand, high = artisanal brand)
estimated_cost_contexts.restaurant: Per-serving cost at restaurant/deli (low = casual, high = premium)
